# Capy — memory index (auto-generated)
> Deterministic catalog regenerated by Capy on every write (T79). Tiered model: **hot → index → page**. Read `hot.md` first. · updated 2026-07-18

## Layers
- **hot.md** — where we left off (1s resume). Read first.
- **decisions.md** — dated decisions + why (append-only).
- **roadmap/** — cards (1 file = 1 item, `status` frontmatter). 0 cards.
- **sessions/** — session digests. 10 files.
- **archive/** — frozen, read-only history. 0 files.
